title: bupleurum ranunculoides var. latifolium
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides var. latifolium, also known as broad-leaved bupleurum, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. Bupleurum ranunculoides var. latifolium can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal medicine.
